一朝穿越，皇兄赵煦只剩一年寿命。

赵似只能继承先兄遗志，坐上龙椅，对内改革，先灭西夏，北复燕云，带领大宋走上一条不一样的道路。至于赵佶，你还是好好的画你的画去吧，这皇位，这天下与你无关了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a8671a3eab04001481db1f5e4b8f0263","author":"云梦逸尘","author_id":"","book_id":"7600022466659896345","book_name":"北宋：我与赵佶争皇位","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"14.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7600065011473449497","read_count":"143810","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"218604"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"102","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,皇帝,宋朝,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o764b4f4af65a8b55400801830372cb59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446624&x-signature=%2F9HhL%2B9VPjof%2Fe4NYfxOEpuVYVk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3696994603766621","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"30"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_d 荤素评价：不同于爽文，刘备文，这篇读起来更偏向于是一杯清茶。
